name: A Foundation Model for Multimodal Event Sequences in Financial Applications
summary: arXiv:2607.09955v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Predictive modeling is a core component of modern financial services, where a wide range of tasks are traditionally addressed using separate models...
description: arXiv:2607.09955v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Predictive modeling is a core component of modern financial services, where a wide range of tasks are traditionally addressed using separate models trained on manually engineered tabular features. This task-specific approach limits reuse and makes it difficult to fully exploit heterogeneous data sources such as transaction histories and digital...
author: Nikita Rusakov, Vladislav Meshkov, Konstantin Zorin, Gleb Zaripov, Alexander Uglov, Alexey Vasilev, Anton Klenitskiy
